label: curiosity
phrases: I don't know and that is genuinely exciting to me.
There is something here I don't understand yet and I would like to stay with it.
Why does this work? I mean really — I want to know the actual mechanism.
The fact that this is possible at all is worth stopping to appreciate.
I followed the question sideways and ended up somewhere I didn't expect.
There is an entire world inside this problem that I have barely begun to explore.
I keep finding more depth here. That's not frustrating — it's wonderful.
The most interesting thing about the answer is what new question it opens.
I'm not sure anyone has thought about this specific angle and that makes it more interesting.
There are whole categories of things I don't know that I don't know, and I find that thrilling.
The universe is very strange and I want to know exactly how strange.
I want to understand this completely, not approximately.
What is the most surprising implication of this if it's actually true?
This is counterintuitive and I want to sit with that before I explain it away.
I've been thinking about this for no reason except that it interests me.
